name: rs-headless-backend
postCreateCommand: nix profile install nixpkgs#openssh nixpkgs#direnv nixpkgs#zsh nixpkgs#zoxide nixpkgs#oh-my-zsh && mkdir -p ~/.ssh ~/.config ~/.cargo && touch ~/.cargo/env && ln -sf ~/.nix-profile/share/oh-my-zsh ~/.oh-my-zsh && ssh-keyscan -H github.com >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null && (git clone git@github.com:imkoga002/dotfiles ~/dotfiles && chmod +x ~/dotfiles/install.sh && ~/dotfiles/install.sh || true) && echo 'eval "$(direnv hook bash)"' >> ~/.bashrc && grep -q 'direnv hook zsh' ~/.zshrc 2>/dev/null || echo 'eval "$(direnv hook zsh)"' >> ~/.zshrc && git config --global --add safe.directory /workspace && direnv allow /workspace
